megamod.configuration.title: MegaMod Configs
gui.megamod.patrol_spawned: A patrol has been spotted nearby!
item.megamod.sunday_grande_jatte: A Sunday on La Grande Jatte
item.megamod.wanderer_above_fog: Wanderer Above the Sea of Fog
item.megamod.dance_at_moulin: Dance at Le Moulin de la Galette
spell.megamod.radiance_melee.name: Radiance
spell.megamod.radiance_melee.description: On melee hit: {trigger_chance} chance to heal yourself and nearby allies by {heal}.
spell.megamod.radiance_ranged.name: Radiance
spell.megamod.radiance_ranged.descriptio: On arrow hit: {trigger_chance} chance to heal yourself and nearby allies by {heal}.
spell.megamod.radiance_spell.name: Radiance
spell.megamod.radiance_spell.description: On spell cast: {trigger_chance} chance to heal yourself and nearby allies by {heal}.
spell.megamod.stunning_melee.name: Stunning
spell.megamod.stunning_melee.description: On melee hit: {trigger_chance} chance to stun the targets for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.exploding_melee.name: Exploding
spell.megamod.exploding_melee.descriptio: On melee hit: {trigger_chance} chance to cause fiery explosion on a target, dealing {damage} damage.
spell.megamod.wither_melee.name: Withering
spell.megamod.wither_melee.description: On melee hit: {trigger_chance_1} chance to inflict the target with strong Wither effect for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.wither_ranged.name: Withering
spell.megamod.wither_ranged.description: On arrow hit: {trigger_chance} chance to inflict the target with strong Wither effect for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.flame_cloud_melee.name: Flame Strike
spell.megamod.flame_cloud_melee.descript: On melee hit: {trigger_chance} chance to ignite the area around the target, dealing {damage} damage per second.
spell.megamod.flame_cloud_ranged.name: Flame Strike
spell.megamod.flame_cloud_ranged.descrip: On arrow hit: {trigger_chance} chance to ignite the area around the target, dealing {damage} damage per second.
spell.megamod.flame_cloud_spell.name: Flame Strike
spell.megamod.flame_cloud_spell.descript: On spell hit: {trigger_chance} chance to ignite the area around the target, dealing {damage} damage per second.
spell.megamod.poison_cloud_melee.name: Poison Cloud
spell.megamod.poison_cloud_melee.descrip: On melee hit: {trigger_chance} chance to create a toxic cloud around the target, lasting for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.poison_cloud_ranged.name: Poison Cloud
spell.megamod.poison_cloud_ranged.descri: On arrow hit: {trigger_chance} chance to create a toxic cloud around the target, lasting for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.slowing_melee.name: Frostbite
spell.megamod.slowing_melee.description: On melee hit: {trigger_chance} chance to slow movement and attack speed of the the target by {bonus}, for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.leeching_melee.name: Leeching
spell.megamod.leeching_melee.description: Defeating enemies heals you by a small portion of their max health.
spell.megamod.leeching_spell.name: Leeching
spell.megamod.leeching_spell.description: Defeating enemies heals you by a small portion of their max health.
spell.megamod.swirling_melee.name: Swirling
spell.megamod.swirling_melee.description: The last attack in a combo performs a swirling attack, dealing {damage} damage to nearby enemies.
spell.megamod.guarding_strike_melee.name: Guarding Strike
spell.megamod.guarding_strike_melee.desc: Defeating enemies grants you and nearby allies a temporary effect reducing damage taken by {bonus}, lasting {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.sundering_melee.name: Sundering
spell.megamod.sundering_melee.descriptio: On melee hit: {trigger_chance} chance to reduce the target's armor by {bonus} for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.unyielding_shield.name: Unyielding
spell.megamod.unyielding_shield.descript: Blocking grants you increased knockback resistance and armor toughness, lasting {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.guarding_shield.name: Guarding
spell.megamod.guarding_shield.descriptio: On shield block: {trigger_chance} chance to reduce damage taken by {bonus}, lasting {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.spiked_shield.name: Spiked
spell.megamod.spiked_shield.description: On shield block: {trigger_chance} chance to deal {damage} damage to the attacker.
spell.megamod.bonus_shot_ranged.name: Bonus Shot
spell.megamod.bonus_shot_ranged.descript: On arrow hit: {trigger_chance} chance to shoot an additional arrow.
spell.megamod.rampaging_melee.name: Rampaging
spell.megamod.rampaging_melee.descriptio: Defeating enemies grants Rampaging effect, increasing your damage by {bonus}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.rampaging_ranged.name: Focusing
spell.megamod.rampaging_ranged.descripti: Defeating enemies grants Focusing effect, increasing your damage by {bonus}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.rampaging_spell.name: Surging
spell.megamod.rampaging_spell.descriptio: Defeating enemies grants Surging effect, increasing your spell critical chance by {bonus}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.frost_cloud_spell.name: Frosty Puddle
spell.megamod.frost_cloud_spell.descript: On spell hit: {trigger_chance} chance to create a freezing zone around the target, slowing its movement and attack speed, lasting for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.cooldown_shot_spell.name: Cooldown Shot
spell.megamod.cooldown_shot_spell.descri: On spell critical hit: {trigger_chance} chance to reset your spell cooldowns.
spell.megamod.shockwave_melee.name: Shockwave
spell.megamod.shockwave_melee.descriptio: The last attack in a combo sends a shockwave forward, dealing {damage} damage to enemies in its path.
spell.megamod.shockwave_area_spell.name: Shockwave Area
spell.megamod.shockwave_area_spell.descr: Damaging spells with longer than 5 seconds cooldown, send shockwaves around you, dealing {damage} damage to enemies in their path.
spell.megamod.chain_reaction_spell.name: Chain Reaction
spell.megamod.chain_reaction_spell.descr: On spell critical hit: launches a spell projectile with chain reaction, dealing {damage} spell damage.
spell.megamod.guardian_heal.name: Guardian Remedy
spell.megamod.guardian_heal.description: Healing targets under {threshold} health grants them a temporary absorption shield, lasting {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.cooldown_heal.name: Cooldown Touch
spell.megamod.cooldown_heal.description: Healing targets under {threshold} health, has {trigger_chance} chance to reset your spell cooldowns.
megamod.corruption.zone_appeared: A dark corruption has appeared near %s!
megamod.corruption.warning: Warning: You are in a corruption zone!
megamod.corruption.seeping: You feel the corruption seeping into your bones...
megamod.corruption.block_dissolved: The corruption dissolves your placed block!
megamod.corruption.territory_warning: Your faction territory is being corrupted!
megamod.corruption.pushback: Your colony's presence is pushing back the darkness!
megamod.corruption.zone_destroyed: Your colony has purged the darkness!
megamod.purge.started: A purge has begun! Kill corrupted mobs to cleanse the zone!
megamod.purge.success: Purge successful! The corruption has been cleansed!
megamod.purge.failed: Purge failed! The corruption grows stronger...
megamod.purge.wave: Another wave of corrupted mobs approaches!
megamod.purge.reward: You earned %d MegaCoins for the purge!
megamod.purge.already_active: A purge is already in progress!
megamod.purge.too_far: You must be closer to the corruption zone!
effect.megamod.frozen.description: Prevents movement, removed upon taking damage, vulnerable to frost magic
effect.megamod.frost_shield.description: Blocks incoming attacks while active, but slows down movement
spell.megamod.arcane_bolt.name: Arcane Bolt
spell.megamod.arcane_bolt.description: Shoots a bolt of energy, causing {damage} arcane spell damage.
spell.megamod.arcane_blast.name: Arcane Blast
spell.megamod.arcane_blast.description: Blasts the target, causing {damage} arcane damage. Grants Arcane Charge, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times.
spell.megamod.arcane_missile.name: Arcane Missiles
spell.megamod.arcane_missile.description: Continuously shoots bolts of energy piercing thru {pierce} targets, causing {damage} arcane damage every second.
spell.megamod.arcane_beam.name: Arcane Beam
spell.megamod.arcane_beam.description: Channels a beam of energy, dealing {damage} arcane damage every second. Consumes all Arcane Charges.
spell.megamod.arcane_blink.name: Blink
spell.megamod.fire_scorch.name: Scorch
spell.megamod.fire_scorch.description: Scorches the target, causing {damage} fire spell damage and setting it on fire.
spell.megamod.fireball.name: Fireball
spell.megamod.fireball.description: Launches an ball of fire, causing up to {damage} fire spell and setting the target on fire.
spell.megamod.fire_blast.name: Pyroblast
spell.megamod.fire_blast.description: Launches an explosive ball of fire, causing up to {damage} fire spell damage in {impact_range} blocks radius.
spell.megamod.fire_breath.name: Fire Breath
spell.megamod.fire_breath.description: Incinerates targets in front, dealing up to {damage} fire spell damage every second.
spell.megamod.fire_meteor.name: Meteor
spell.megamod.fire_meteor.description: Crashes a meteors on the target, each causing up to {damage} fire spell damage within {impact_range} blocks.
spell.megamod.fire_wall.name: Wall of Flames
spell.megamod.fire_wall.description: Creates a wall of fire, lasting {cloud_duration} seconds, dealing up to {damage} fire spell damage continuously to enemies passing thru.
spell.megamod.frost_shard.name: Frost Shard
spell.megamod.frost_shard.description: Launches a frost shard that may bounce of walls, causing {damage} frost spell damage on impact.
spell.megamod.frostbolt.name: Frostbolt
spell.megamod.frostbolt.description: Launches a ball of frost ricocheting to {ricochet} additional nearby targets, causing {damage} frost spell damage and slowing the target on impact.
spell.megamod.frost_nova.name: Frost Nova
spell.megamod.frost_nova.description: Freezes targets around you for {effect_duration} seconds, causing {damage} frost spell damage and blocking their movement. Frozen targets are vulnerable to frost magic.
spell.megamod.frost_shield.name: Frost Shield
spell.megamod.frost_shield.description: Protects you from attacks, projectiles and fire for {effect_duration} seconds, but also slows down your movement.
spell.megamod.frost_blizzard.name: Blizzard
spell.megamod.frost_blizzard.description: Channels a rain of frost shards down onto your target and nearby enemies, dealing up to {damage} frost spell damage slowing the target, in {impact_range} blocks radius.
_comment_rogues_blocks: Rogues & Warriors block and villager translations
spell.megamod.slice_and_dice.name: Slice & Dice
spell.megamod.slice_and_dice.description: Enter a battle trance, during which your attacks will each grant extra power, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times. Expires after {effect_duration} sec.
spell.megamod.shock_powder.name: Shock Powder
spell.megamod.shadow_step.name: Shadowstep
spell.megamod.shadow_step.description: Step through the shadows to appear behind your target.
spell.megamod.vanish.name: Vanish
spell.megamod.vanish.description: Vanish from sight, entering stealth for {effect_duration} sec. Performing any action or taking damage will break the effect.
spell.megamod.shattering_throw.name: Shattering Throw
spell.megamod.shattering_throw.descripti: Throw your weapon at the target, dealing {damage} damage and reducing their armor for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.megamod.shout.name: Demoralizing Shout
spell.megamod.shout.description: Shout at nearby enemies, reducing their attack damage for {effect_duration} sec, and dealing a small amount of damage.
spell.megamod.charge.name: Charge
spell.megamod.charge.description: Increases movement speed and knockback resistance, frees you from movement impairing effects, lasts for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.megamod.whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
spell.megamod.whirlwind.description: Hold to spin around, dealing {damage} damage per second to nearby enemies.
item.megamod.auto_fire_hook.description_: Can be applied to ranged weapons, on an Anvil.
item.megamod.quiver.hint: Provides arrows for archery, when equipped.
item.megamod.spell_book/archer.spell_bin:
Spell Book of Archers, using ranged weapons and archery skills to defeat enemies from afar
- Strengths: Dealing high damage at range and maintaining mobility
- Weaknesses: Heavily armored enemies
- Equipment: Moderately armored
spell.megamod.power_shot.name: Power Shot
spell.megamod.power_shot.description: Your next {effect_amplifier_cap} arrows inflict the target with Hunter's Mark for {effect_duration} seconds, increasing its damage taken by {damage_taken}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times.
effect.megamod.hunters_mark.description: Increases damage taken from all sources
spell.megamod.entangling_roots.name: Entangling Roots
spell.megamod.entangling_roots.descripti: Conjures roots to sprout from the ground in the nearby area, slowing down enemies for {cloud_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.barrage.name: Barrage
spell.megamod.barrage.description: Fires multiple arrows in quick succession.
spell.megamod.magic_arrow.name: Magic Arrow
spell.megamod.magic_arrow.description: Shoots a magical arrow piercing thru all enemies in its path, dealing {damage} damage to each target.
advancements.rpg_series.spell_cast_arche: Use a skill from the Archery Manual
advancements.rpg_series.trade_with_arche: Purchase an item from an Archery Artisan Villager
item.megamod.spell_book/paladin.spell_bi:
Spell Book of Paladins, using weapons and spells to attack enemies and support allies
- Strengths: Versatile in battle, able to heal, strike, and defend
- Weaknesses: Limited ranged attacks and mobility
- Equipment: Heavily armored
item.megamod.spell_book/priest.spell_bin:
Spell Book of Priests, using holy magic to heal allies and damage enemies
- Strengths: Supporting and healing allies, destroying undead
- Weaknesses: Low damage and poor physical defense
- Equipment: Lightly armored
spell.megamod.flash_heal.name: Flash Heal
spell.megamod.flash_heal.description: Heals you or a friendly target by {heal} health points.
spell.megamod.divine_protection.name: Divine Protection
spell.megamod.divine_protection.descript: Protects you from the next incoming attacks (up to {effect_amplifier_cap}), for {effect_duration} seconds.
effect.megamod.divine_protection.descrip: Protects you from the incoming attack
spell.megamod.judgement.name: Judgement
spell.megamod.judgement.description: Strikes your target and enemies around it, within {impact_range} blocks, causing up to {damage} damage and stunning them for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.battle_banner.name: Battle Banner
spell.megamod.battle_banner.description: Increases attack speed and knockback resistance for you and allies nearby, within {cloud_radius} blocks, for {cloud_duration} seconds.
effect.megamod.battle_banner.description: Increases attack speed and knockback resistance
spell.megamod.heal.name: Heal
spell.megamod.heal.description: Heals you or a friendly target by {heal} health points.
spell.megamod.holy_shock.name: Holy Shock
spell.megamod.holy_shock.description: Heals you or a friendly target by {heal}, smites an enemy dealing {damage} spell damage.
spell.megamod.holy_beam.name: Holy Light
spell.megamod.holy_beam.description: Channels a beam of light, healing friends by {heal}, and dealing {damage} spell damage to enemies every second.
spell.megamod.circle_of_healing.name: Circle of Healing
spell.megamod.circle_of_healing.descript: Heals you and friendly targets around you by {heal}, and applies some absorption for {effect_duration} seconds.
effect.megamod.priest_absorption.descrip: Absorbs some damage you would take
spell.megamod.barrier.name: Barrier
spell.megamod.barrier.description: Summons a circular barrier, protecting you and allies from projectiles, magic or enemies intruding the area.
advancements.rpg_series.spell_cast_palad: Cast a spell from the Paladin Libram
advancements.rpg_series.spell_cast_pries: Cast a spell from the Holy Book
Cast a spell with a healing wand
Purchase an item from a Monk Villager
item.megamod.gold_ring.lore: Shows affection to your loved one.
item.megamod.unique_attack_ring.lore: A shattered piece of onyx, repurposed in a crude way.
item.megamod.unique_attack_necklace.lore: The original owner must not have been very popular.
item.megamod.unique_dex_ring.lore: They won't see you coming, but they'll definitely see you leaving.
item.megamod.unique_dex_necklace.lore: Be careful not to choke on your aspirations.
item.megamod.unique_archer_necklace.lore: Highborne artifact, passed down through generations.
item.megamod.unique_tank_ring.lore: Lightweight, yet durable. Made out of a titanium.
item.megamod.unique_arcane_necklace.lore: The inscriptions glow to brightly to read, maybe something about radiation?
item.megamod.unique_fire_ring.lore: Delicate elven design, forged in the heart of the Sunwell.
item.megamod.unique_fire_necklace.lore: Ancient gift from the Magister's Terrace.
item.megamod.unique_frost_ring.lore: Times change, but this piece remains.
item.megamod.unique_frost_necklace.lore: Unusually sharp edges, yet it feels smooth to the touch.
item.megamod.unique_healing_necklace.lor: Holds a piece of the Holy City of Celestis.
item.megamod.unique_spell_ring.lore: The energy of the universe flows through this ring.
item.megamod.unique_spell_necklace.lore: Focuses the mind, sharpens the senses.
item.megamod.unique_crit_ring.lore: Each blow hurts twice. Once to give, once to remember.
item.megamod.unique_crit_necklace.lore: The screams stopped long ago, but the echo still seems to hit a weak spot.
item.megamod.unique_lightning_necklace.l: Extracts vacuum energy from an artificial region of subspace-time until it reaches maximum entropy.
item.megamod.unique_soul_ring.lore: Not to be shattered, the souls inside are kept there for a reason.
item.megamod.unique_soul_necklace.lore: The attached fangs hint at something truly sinister.
item.megamod.rune_pouch.hint: Provides runes for spell casting, when equipped.

item.megamod.wizards_spell_book/arcane.s:
Spell Book of Arcane Wizards, using pure energy to focus powerful attacks on single targets
- Strengths: Focused magical damage against individual enemies
- Weaknesses: Very low defense
- Equipment: Lightly armored
item.megamod.wizards_spell_book/fire.spe:
Spell Book of Fire Wizards, using fiery magic to defeat enemies both near and far
- Strengths: Magical damage dealt at large areas
- Weaknesses: Low defense and mobility
- Equipment: Lightly armored
item.megamod.wizards_spell_book/frost.sp:
Spell Book of Frost Wizards, using cold magic to slow enemies and control the battlefield
- Strengths: Magical damage that slows and freezes enemies
- Weaknesses: Low defense and mobility
- Equipment: Lightly armored

spell.megamod.wizards_fireball.descripti: Launches an ball of fire, causing up to {damage} fire spell and setting the target on fire.
spell.megamod.wizards_fire_blast.name: Pyroblast
spell.megamod.wizards_fire_blast.descrip: Launches an explosive ball of fire, causing up to {damage} fire spell damage in {impact_range} blocks radius.
spell.megamod.wizards_fire_breath.name: Fire Breath
spell.megamod.wizards_fire_breath.descri: Incinerates targets in front, dealing up to {damage} fire spell damage every second.
spell.megamod.wizards_fire_meteor.name: Meteor
spell.megamod.wizards_fire_meteor.descri: Crashes a meteors on the target, each causing up to {damage} fire spell damage within {impact_range} blocks.
spell.megamod.wizards_fire_wall.name: Wall of Flames
spell.megamod.wizards_fire_wall.descript: Creates a wall of fire, lasting {cloud_duration} seconds, dealing up to {damage} fire spell damage continuously to enemies passing thru.
spell.megamod.wizards_frost_shard.name: Frost Shard
spell.megamod.wizards_frost_shard.descri: Launches a frost shard that may bounce of walls, causing {damage} frost spell damage on impact.
spell.megamod.wizards_frostbolt.name: Frostbolt
spell.megamod.wizards_frostbolt.descript: Launches a ball of frost ricocheting to {ricochet} additional nearby targets, causing {damage} frost spell damage and slowing the target on impact.
spell.megamod.wizards_frost_nova.name: Frost Nova
spell.megamod.wizards_frost_nova.descrip: Freezes targets around you for {effect_duration} seconds, causing {damage} frost spell damage and blocking their movement. Frozen targets are vulnerable to frost magic.
effect.megamod.wizards_frozen.descriptio: Prevents movement, removed upon taking damage, vulnerable to frost magic
spell.megamod.wizards_frost_shield.name: Frost Shield
spell.megamod.wizards_frost_shield.descr: Protects you from attacks, projectiles and fire for {effect_duration} seconds, but also slows down your movement.
effect.megamod.wizards_frost_shield.desc: Blocks incoming attacks while active, but slows down movement
spell.megamod.wizards_frost_blizzard.des: Channels a rain of frost shards down onto your target and nearby enemies, dealing up to {damage} frost spell damage slowing the target, in {impact_range} blocks radius.
advancements.rpg_series.spell_novice_arc: Obtain your first Arcane Wizard Spell
advancements.rpg_series.spell_novice_fir: Obtain your first Fire Wizard Spell
advancements.rpg_series.spell_novice_fro: Obtain your first Frost Wizard Spell
advancements.rpg_series.obtain_wizard_ro: Acquire a full set of Wizard Robes
advancements.rpg_series.spell_cast_arcan: Cast a spell with an Arcane Wand
advancements.rpg_series.spell_cast_fire_: Cast a spell with a Fire Wand
advancements.rpg_series.spell_cast_frost: Cast a spell with a Frost Wand
advancements.rpg_series.spell_cast_arcan: Cast a spell from the Arcane Tome
advancements.rpg_series.spell_cast_fire_: Cast a spell from the Fire Tome
advancements.rpg_series.spell_cast_frost: Cast a spell from the Frost Tome
advancements.rpg_series.trade_with_wizar: Trade with a Wizard Merchant villager
item.megamod.paladins_spell_book/paladin:
Spell Book of Paladins, using weapons and spells to attack enemies and support allies
- Strengths: Versatile in battle, able to heal, strike, and defend
- Weaknesses: Limited ranged attacks and mobility
- Equipment: Heavily armored
Spell Book of Priests, using holy magic to heal allies and damage enemies
- Strengths: Supporting and healing allies, destroying undead
- Weaknesses: Low damage and poor physical defense
- Equipment: Lightly armored
spell.megamod.paladins_flash_heal.name: Flash Heal
spell.megamod.paladins_flash_heal.descri: Heals you or a friendly target by {heal} health points.
spell.megamod.paladins_divine_protection: Protects you from the next incoming attacks (up to {effect_amplifier_cap}), for {effect_duration} seconds.
effect.megamod.paladins_divine_protectio: Protects you from the incoming attack
spell.megamod.paladins_judgement.name: Judgement
spell.megamod.paladins_judgement.descrip: Strikes your target and enemies around it, within {impact_range} blocks, causing up to {damage} damage and stunning them for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.paladins_battle_banner.des: Increases attack speed and knockback resistance for you and allies nearby, within {cloud_radius} blocks, for {cloud_duration} seconds.
effect.megamod.paladins_battle_banner.de: Increases attack speed and knockback resistance
spell.megamod.paladins_heal.name: Heal
spell.megamod.paladins_heal.description: Heals you or a friendly target by {heal} health points.
spell.megamod.paladins_holy_shock.name: Holy Shock
spell.megamod.paladins_holy_shock.descri: Heals you or a friendly target by {heal}, smites an enemy dealing {damage} spell damage.
spell.megamod.paladins_holy_beam.name: Holy Light
spell.megamod.paladins_holy_beam.descrip: Channels a beam of light, healing friends by {heal}, and dealing {damage} spell damage to enemies every second.
spell.megamod.paladins_circle_of_healing: Heals you and friendly targets around you by {heal}, and applies some absorption for {effect_duration} seconds.
effect.megamod.paladins_priest_absorptio: Absorbs some damage you would take
spell.megamod.paladins_barrier.name: Barrier
spell.megamod.paladins_barrier.descripti: Summons a circular barrier, protecting you and allies from projectiles, magic or enemies intruding the area.
item.megamod.rogues_spell_book/rogue.spe:
Spell Book of Rogues, using quick weapons and skills to strike enemies from the shadows
- Strengths: High mobility and melee attack damage
- Weaknesses: Mediocre defense and limited ranged attacks
- Equipment: Moderately armored
item.megamod.rogues_spell_book/warrior.s:
Spell Book of Warriors, using heavy weapons and skills to dominate close combat
- Strengths: Strong melee attacks with good mobility
- Weaknesses: Limited ranged attacks and supportive skills
- Equipment: Heavily armored
spell.megamod.rogues_slice_and_dice.name: Slice & Dice
spell.megamod.rogues_slice_and_dice.desc: Enter a battle trance, during which your attacks will each grant extra power, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times. Expires after {effect_duration} sec.
spell.megamod.rogues_shock_powder.name: Shock Powder
spell.megamod.rogues_shadow_step.name: Shadowstep
spell.megamod.rogues_shadow_step.descrip: Step through the shadows to appear behind your target.
spell.megamod.rogues_vanish.name: Vanish
spell.megamod.rogues_vanish.description: Vanish from sight, entering stealth for {effect_duration} sec. Performing any action or taking damage will break the effect.
spell.megamod.rogues_throw.name: Shattering Throw
spell.megamod.rogues_throw.description: Throw your weapon at the target, dealing {damage} damage and reducing their armor by {armor_reduction} for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.megamod.rogues_shout.name: Demoralizing Shout
spell.megamod.rogues_shout.description: Shout at nearby enemies, reducing their attack damage by {damage_reduction} for {effect_duration} sec, and dealing a small amount of damage.
spell.megamod.rogues_charge.name: Charge
spell.megamod.rogues_charge.description: Increases movement speed and knockback resistance, frees you from movement impairing effects, lasts for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.megamod.rogues_whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
spell.megamod.rogues_whirlwind.descripti: Hold to spin around, dealing {damage} damage per second, to nearby enemies.
advancements.rpg_series.spell_cast_warri: Use a skill from the Warrior's Codex
advancements.rpg_series.spell_cast_rogue: Use a skill from the Rogue Handbook
advancements.rpg_series.trade_with_arms_: Trade with an Arms Dealer villager
item.megamod.archers_auto_fire_hook.desc: Can be applied to ranged weapons, on an Anvil.
item.megamod.archers_quiver.hint: Provides arrows for archery, when equipped.
item.megamod.archers_spell_book/archer.s:
Spell Book of Archers, using ranged weapons and archery skills to defeat enemies from afar
- Strengths: Dealing high damage at range and maintaining mobility
- Weaknesses: Heavily armored enemies
- Equipment: Moderately armored
spell.megamod.archers_power_shot.name: Power Shot
spell.megamod.archers_power_shot.descrip: Your next {effect_amplifier_cap} arrows inflict the target with Hunter's Mark for {effect_duration} seconds, increasing its damage taken by {damage_taken}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times.
effect.megamod.archers_hunters_mark.desc: Increases damage taken from all sources
spell.megamod.archers_entangling_roots.d: Conjures roots to sprout from the ground in the nearby area, slowing down enemies for {cloud_duration} seconds.
spell.megamod.archers_barrage.name: Barrage
spell.megamod.archers_barrage.descriptio: Fires multiple arrows in quick succession.
spell.megamod.archers_magic_arrow.name: Magic Arrow
spell.megamod.archers_magic_arrow.descri: Shoots a magical arrow piercing thru all enemies in its path, dealing {damage} damage to each target.
item.megamod.runes_rune_pouch.hint: Provides runes for spell casting, when equipped.
item.megamod.spell_engine_scroll.table_h: Attachable to Spell Book using Spell Binding Table
tutorial.spell_hotbar.title: Focus Spell Hotbar
spell.megamod.spell_engine_use_item.name: Use Item
spell.megamod.spell_engine_use_item.desc: Use one of the held items.
spell.tooltip.spell_binding_tip: (Use Spell Binding Table to add spells)
text.autoconfig.spell_engine.title: Spell Engine
text.autoconfig.spell_engine.option.clie: High luminance beams
Render spell beams with high luminance, for better spectacular visual effects
Hold to cast CHANNELLED spells
This applies for channeled spells only! If enabled, the spell casting stops when releasing the key, otherwise when the key is pressed again
Hold to cast CHARGED spells
This applies for charged spells only! If enabled, the spell casting stops when releasing the key, otherwise when the key is pressed again
Auto swap Spear & Bow
Having a Spear and Bow in main and offhand, attack key will swap to the Spear, use key will swap to the Bow.
Hide offhand item on Spell Hotbar
When usable held item is shown on Spell Hotbar
Spell Hotbar Use key
When use key is free to use, use it for the first spell slot
Spell Hotbar Slot 1 fallback
Spell Hotbar Slot 1 to use the selected vanilla keybind, when unassigned in Options/Controls/Key Binds
Spell Hotbar Slot 2 fallback
Spell Hotbar Slot 1 to use the selected vanilla keybind, when unassigned in Options/Controls/Key Binds
Spell Hotbar Slot 3 fallback
Spell Hotbar Slot 3 to use the selected vanilla keybind, when unassigned in Options/Controls/Key Binds
Spell Hotbar Slot 4 fallback
Spell Hotbar Slot 4 to use the selected vanilla keybind, when unassigned in Options/Controls/Key Binds
Spell Hotbar Slot 5 fallback
Spell Hotbar Slot 5 to use the selected vanilla keybind, when unassigned in Options/Controls/Key Binds
Spell Hotbar Slot 6 fallback
Spell Hotbar Slot 6 to use the selected vanilla keybind, when unassigned in Options/Controls/Key Binds
Spell Hotbar Slot 7 fallback
Spell Hotbar Slot 7 to use the selected vanilla keybind, when unassigned in Options/Controls/Key Binds
Spell Hotbar Slot 8 fallback
Spell Hotbar Slot 8 to use the selected vanilla keybind, when unassigned in Options/Controls/Key Binds
Spell Hotbar Slot 9 fallback
Spell Hotbar Slot 9 to use the selected vanilla keybind, when unassigned in Options/Controls/Key Binds
Sneaking bypasses Spell Hotbar
If enabled, sneak to use shield with an active Spell Hotbar
Prioritize casting spell for 'use' keybind
Spell on the 'use' keybind will try to cast spells before interacting blocks and entities
Show target name when multiple
Show target name when more than one entity is being targeted
Highlight target
Render glowing effect on targeted entity
Filter invalid targets
Prevent targeting allies with hostile spells, enemies with helpful spells
Always show full spell tooltip
Show all spell details on item tooltips, without having to press a button
Spell Binding hint
Show Spell Binding Table hint to tooltip of empty staves
Spell Book support hint
Weapons tooltips show `Casts spells from equipped Spell Book`
Spell cast error messages
Show error message on HUD about the failure of spell cast attempts
Shoulder Surfing bow-like behaviour
Allow Shoulder Surfing Adaptive cursor for spell caster items, only while casting spells
First-person player animations
Spell casting player animations to be shown. Only recommended to change if custom camera mods in use.
block.megamod.spell_engine_spell_binding: Use it to create and fill Spell Books.
gui.megamod.spell_engine_spell_binding.t: Another spell of this tier is already bound
advancements.rpg_series.root.title: Spells
advancements.rpg_series.root.description: Discover the art of magical combat!
advancements.rpg_series.enchant_spell_in: Obtain Spell Infinity enchantment from the Enchanting Table
advancements.rpg_series.rune_crafter.des: Use the Rune Crafting Altar to get twice as many runes
advancements.rpg_series.spellbinder.desc: Bind a spell to an eligible magical weapon
advancements.rpg_series.classes.title: Choose your path
advancements.rpg_series.classes.descript: Visit a Spell Binding Table to create your first Spell Book!
advancements.rpg_series.misc_items.title: Magical Items
advancements.rpg_series.misc_items.descr: Discover various items essential for spell casting!
spell.rpg_series.cleave.description: Performs a spin attack, dealing {damage} damage to nearby enemies.
spell.rpg_series.cleave.name: Cleave
spell.rpg_series.fan_of_knives.descripti: Throws several of your blades in a cone, dealing {damage} damage, bouncing off terrain up to {bounce} times.
spell.rpg_series.fan_of_knives.name: Fan of Knives
spell.rpg_series.flurry.description: Hold to unleash a rapid series of strikes, while also gaining momentum.
spell.rpg_series.flurry.name: Flurry
spell.rpg_series.ground_slam.description: Leaps into the air and slams into the ground, dealing {damage} damage to nearby enemies.
spell.rpg_series.ground_slam.name: Ground Slam
spell.rpg_series.impale.description: Throws your weapon forwards, dealing {damage} damage and powerful knockback.
spell.rpg_series.impale.name: Impale
spell.rpg_series.smash.description: Delivers a strike with powerful knockback, disabling shield and item usage of target.
spell.rpg_series.smash.name: Smash
spell.rpg_series.swift_strikes.descripti: Unleash a rapid series of strikes.
spell.rpg_series.swift_strikes.name: Swift Strikes
spell.rpg_series.swipe.description: Slide forward with your weapon, striking all enemies along your path.
spell.rpg_series.swipe.name: Swipe
spell.rpg_series.thrust.description: Lunge forward with your weapon, striking all enemies along your path.
spell.rpg_series.thrust.name: Thrust
spell.rpg_series.whirlwind.description: Hold to spin around, dealing {damage} damage per second, to nearby enemies.
spell.rpg_series.whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
effect.megamod.spell_power_generic.descr: Increases effectiveness of all kinds of spells.
effect.megamod.spell_power_critical_chan: Increases chance of critical strikes done with spells.
effect.megamod.spell_power_critical_dama: Increases damage/healing of critical strikes done with spells.
effect.megamod.spell_power_haste.descrip: Increases casting speed of your spells.
enchantment.megamod.spell_power_spell_po: Increases all kinds of spell damage you deal.
enchantment.megamod.spell_power_soulfros: Increases soul and frost spell damage you deal.
Increases arcane and fire spell damage you deal.
enchantment.megamod.spell_power_energize: Increases healing and lightning spell damage you deal.
enchantment.megamod.spell_power_critical: Increases chance of critical strikes done with spells.
Increases damage/healing of critical strikes done with spells.
enchantment.megamod.spell_power_haste.de: Increases casting speed of your spells.
